checks.name: SPE_PATH_DETECTED
checks.evidence: intakeData.derivation_path === 'SPE' triggers SpeMetrics, class distribution, confidence envelope

checks.name: SPE_METRICS_RENDERED
checks.description: Propositions, Classes, CEU Coverage, Review Items displayed
checks.evidence: 75 Propositions, 6 Classes, 12 CEU Coverage, 0 Review Items visible in snapshot

checks.name: CLASS_DISTRIBUTION_RENDERED
checks.description: All 6 proposition classes with proportional bars
checks.evidence: STRUCTURAL_DOMINANCE: 12, COUPLING_PATTERN: 34, AUTHORITY_TOPOLOGY: 10, TIER_GROUNDING: 12, HERO_MOMENT_GROUNDING: 6, CLUSTER_ARCHITECTURE: 1

checks.name: BLOCKER_RESOLVED_DISTINCTION
checks.description: Resolved blockers show RESOLVED badge and resolution note
checks.evidence: BLK-001, BLK-003, BLK-004, BLK-006 show RESOLVED badge; BLK-002, BLK-005, BLK-007 show unresolved

checks.name: LANE_STATUS_RENDERED
checks.description: All 9 lanes with correct state indicators
checks.evidence: evidence_intake COMPLETE, structural_analysis COMPLETE, semantic_candidate COMPLETE, review_queue PENDING/BLOCKED, crosswalk INAPPLICABLE, reconciliation COMPLETE, qualification_debt PENDING/BLOCKED, promotion_decision BLOCKED, runtime_projection STRUCTURAL_ONLY/BLOCKED

checks.name: SPE_PROVENANCE_RENDERED
checks.description: Engine, Contract ID, Generated date, Learning Events displayed
checks.evidence: Engine: SPE, Contract: PI.PATHB.SEMANTIC-PROPOSITION-ENGINE.01, Generated: 5/21/2026, Learning Events: 3

checks.name: PATH_BADGE_DISPLAYED
checks.evidence: SPE badge visible in posture header alongside S1 and Semantic Intake

checks.name: GOVERNANCE_FOOTER_SPE
checks.description: L3 ceiling disclaimer with deterministic/fail-closed markers
checks.evidence: 'Semantic propositions are CANDIDATE (L3 ceiling). Not canonical semantic authority. Operator review required. · Deterministic · Fail-closed · No grounding mutation'

checks.name: BLUEEDGE_UNCHANGED
checks.description: BlueEdge semantic-candidates still uses Layer A panel
checks.evidence: BlueEdge routes through loadBlueEdgeCandidates() → SemanticCandidateExtractionPanel — not affected by intake panel changes

checks.name: V2_COCKPIT_RENDERS
checks.description: V2 detail route renders SPE intake panel
checks.evidence: /v2/detail/semantic-candidates shows full SPE intake panel with role selection

checks.name: CSR_PATH_PRESERVED
checks.description: CSR rendering path preserved in CsrMetrics component
checks.evidence: CsrMetrics renders total_capabilities, total_components, direct_evidence_ratio — existing CSR fields

checks.name: REPO_ROOT_FIX
checks.evidence: resolveRepoRoot() now checks process.env.REPO_ROOT first, matching SQORuntimeResolver pattern — resolves webpack __dirname issue
